name: Aberdeen Group Qualifications and Peter S. Kastner Biography (1997)
description: A 1997 qualifications and biography document for Aberdeen Group and Peter S. Kastner in his role as Group Vice President of Corporate Computing. It describes Aberdeen's service offerings and Kastner's expertise in OLTP, client/server, distributed systems, and benchmark auditing. The document establishes his prior career history at Digital Equipment, Prime Computer, Stratus Computer, and Arthur D. Little.
